source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 3. 3차 CE TCF 보안사항 제출 (12월10일)/03. Risk_Management/A-RMP-5-01 Risk Management Plan (en) 20200326.pdf

document.title: Risk Management Plan
authorityOrJurisdiction: Medical Device Act, Enforcement Regulations of the Medical Device Act

sourceSummary.oneLine: Risk management plan A-RMP-5-01 Rev.1 for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG digital flat panel X-ray detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines risk management activities, responsibilities, acceptance criteria, verification, and post-production information review for the device life cycle.
keyPoints: The plan applies to medical imaging equipment HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC manufactured by H&abyz Co., Ltd.
The device is indicated for digital imaging in general radiographic systems for human anatomy and is not to be used for mammography.
Legal and standard requirements include Council Directive 93/42/EEC as amended by 2007/47/EC, EN ISO 14971:2012, IEC 60601-1[2006/A1:2013], and IEC 60601-1-2[2015].
Risk acceptability is classified as Green Zone 1-6 acceptable and Red Zone 8-25 not acceptable.
Production and post-production information must be collected and reviewed, including customer complaints, safety information, CAPA data, and published specifications.

concepts.name: Risk Management Plan
concepts.evidence: This risk management plan identifies all potential hazards and reviews, calculates, and plans all activities to be performed

concepts.name: Residual Risk
concepts.evidence: Residual risk: Risk remaining after risk control measures has been taken

concepts.name: Post-production Information
concepts.evidence: The company shall collect information related to customer feedback including customer complaints and after sales service requests after products are delivered to customers

concepts.name: Risk Control
concepts.evidence: Risk control: Process in which decisions are made and measures implemented by which risks are reduced to, or maintained within, specified levels

evidence.claim: The document is Risk Management Plan A-RMP-5-01 Rev.1 issued on MAR/26/2020.
evidence.evidenceText: Document No. A-RMP-5-01 Issue Date MAR/26/2020 Revision No. 1

evidence.claim: The plan is for the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
evidence.evidenceText: For Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd.
The device class stated in the plan is Class IIa.
The intended use is digital imaging for general radiographic systems for human anatomy.
evidence.evidenceText: HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG are indicated for digital imaging solution designed for general radiographic system for human anatomy.

evidence.claim: The device is not to be used for mammography.
evidence.evidenceText: Not to be used for mammography.

evidence.claim: The risk management plan applies to the entire product life cycle.
evidence.evidenceText: This management plan applies the entire life cycle of the product, which includes Design Plan, Design & Development, Design Verification, Design Validation, Purchase, Production, Inspection, Packing & Shipping and after sales service.
evidence.pageTarget: Medical Device Risk Management Life Cycle

evidence.claim: Legal requirements listed include Council Directive 93/42/EEC as amended by 2007/47/EC.
evidence.evidenceText: Council Directive 93/42/EEC as amended by 2007/47/EC of 5 September 2007 concerning medical devices.

evidence.claim: Standard requirements listed include EN ISO 14971:2012.

evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60601-1[2006/A1:2013] Medical electrical equipment Part 1: General requirements
IEC 60601-1-2[2015] Medical electrical equipment Part 1: General requirements

evidence.claim: Risk is defined as a combination of probability of occurrence of harm and severity of that harm.
evidence.evidenceText: Risk: Combination of the probability of occurrence of harm and the severity of that harm

evidence.claim: Risk management is defined as systematic application of policies, procedures and practices to analyzing, evaluating, controlling and monitoring risk.
evidence.evidenceText: Risk management: Systematic application of management policies, procedures and practices to the tasks of analyzing, evaluating, controlling and monitoring risk

evidence.claim: Risk acceptability is classified into Green Zone 1-6 accepted and Red Zone 8-25 not accepted.
evidence.evidenceText: Broadly acceptable – Green Zone(1~6) : Accept 2. Intolerable –Red Zone(8~25) : N/Accept

evidence.claim: Hazard step is calculated as severity multiplied by probability.
If residual risks remain in the Red Zone after control measures, they must be compared with the medical device benefits.
evidence.evidenceText: If residual risks remain in Red Zone after taking risk control measures, the residual risks shall be compared with the benefits of the medical device.

evidence.claim: Post-production information sources include FDA consensus standards, enforcement reports, guidance documents, medical device reports, and recall or market withdrawal portal.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.2.1 FDA 1) Consensus Standard ; www.fda.gov/cdrh/stdsprog.html 2) Enforcement Reports ; www.fda.gov/opacom/Enforce.html 3) Guidance Documents ; www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cdrh/cfdocs/cfggp/search.cfm 5) Medical Device Reports ; www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cdrh/cfdocs/cfMDR/search.cfm 7) Recall/Market withdrawal portal ; www.fda.gov/opacom/7alets.html

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the document's legal requirements emphasize Council Directive 93/42/EEC and Medical Device Act; FDA appears only as a post-production information source.
Product metadata signal HAD/A/F 1417-1717 is broader than the document-specific models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
OCR/text quality includes minor typographical issues such as 'secerity', 'Life-threetening', and inconsistent spacing in H&abyz Co., Ltd.
